sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: As for me, in justice I shall behold your face; I shall be filled with the vision of your glory.

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: Turn to the Lord in your need, and you will live.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: Your Words, Lord, Are Spirit and Life; You Have the Words of Everlasting Life.

sections.title: Unwavering
sections.author: Matt Maher
sections.snippet: Blessed are the poor, the kingdom is theirs, Alive in the promise to be dead to the world. Blessed are the meek, in awe of you, Father, The Word at your right hand, the Spirit of truth.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: The sparrow finds a home, and the swallow a nest for her young: by your altars, O Lord of hosts, my King and my God. Blessed are they who dwell in your house, for ever singing your praise.

sections.title: A Place at Your Table
sections.author: Ben Walther
sections.snippet: Happy the ones whom you call here to dine, the saint and the sinner, your friends. Now reconciled in this banquet divine, the promise of life without end, the promise of life without end.

sections.title: Beautiful Is Your Love
sections.author: Josh Blakesley/Sarah Hart/Marc Byrd
sections.snippet: Oh how beautiful is your love for me. Oh what joy is mine in this mystery. I will not fear the dark, here in the presence of your heart. Oh how beautiful is your love.

sections.title: Lead Me Lord
sections.author: John D. Becker
sections.snippet: Blessed are the poor in spirit, longing for their Lord, for God's coming kingdom shall be theirs. Blessed are the sorrowing, for they shall be consoled, and the meek shall come to rule the world.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
